directive_events.owner_directive: Plan: A1 core/** + A2 blocks/** + A3 previewers/**+docbuild+docs-deletion + A4 tests/** (1 test agent), dispatched in parallel. Then 3 no-context audits. §9 plot behavior-pinning test deferred to #1824 (owner implementing); added after #1824 merges via same test agent.
Write a brand-new dedicated test suite (not edits to existing tests). A4's work kept; A5 added in tests/adr052_contract/**.
directive_events.reason: Owner directive 2026-06-27: keep A4 test work; ALSO dispatch a 2nd dedicated test engineer (A5) to write a brand-new, from-scratch ADR-052 contract test suite under tests/adr052_contract/** (disjoint from A4). Independent spec-derived suite.

docs_events.rationale: owner scoped this PR to docstring-build+tests+anti-regression+delete-docs+template-API only; CHANGELOG narrative + architecture doc + agent skills are other §14 items the owner explicitly excluded (will land separately)

findings.message: AI-authored edits must happen in a dedicated worktree, not the main working tree (/private/var/folders/mk/xk0dqvn934l5425gwb19rsqc0000gn/T/pytest-of-jiazhenz/pytest-810/test_hook_payload_blocks_main_0/main). Create one with `git worktree add ../<name> <branch>` and run your edits there.

owner_directive: Manager: land ADR-052 public API contract per docs/specs/adr-052-public-api-surface.md (owner-signed). Steps 1-3 (declare+decorate+docstring, generate mkdocstrings/griffe reference, freeze snapshot+tests) + scoped §14 (delete docs/block-development, fix custom-block template API). stability module already merged (#1828). Dispatch 3 impl + 1 test agent in parallel, then 3 no-context audits. admin-approved:core-change required (owner-authorized scope; owner asleep).

scope_events.reason: Repoint README block-authoring link from the deleted docs/block-development/quickstart.md to the generated docs/user/reference/ (direct ripple of the owner-scoped §14 docs deletion; minimal 1-line link fix, not a doc rewrite).

mypy ripple fixes from the ADR-052 surface change: (1) unwrap previewers PreviewProvider/PreviewResourceProvider Callable aliases (the no-op stability wrap broke their type-alias validity; tier carried by the snapshot per the non-markable resolution); (2) ai/tools_inspection/read.py used the removed DataObject.metadata shim -> read obj.framework directly. pyproject.toml: removed the dead scistudio.runners entry-point group (runner layer deleted, §7A) + docs optional-deps group (A3 doc build).
